title: The Shawshank Redemption
text: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency. Andy Dufresne, a banker wrongly convicted of murder, befriends Red and slowly works to improve life inside Shawshank prison.
label: positive

title: The Godfather
text: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son. A sweeping portrayal of Italian-American family, power, and loyalty across three decades.
label: positive

title: The Dark Knight
text: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice. Heath Ledger delivers a haunting performance.
label: positive

title: Schindler's List
text: In German-occupied Poland during World War II, industrialist Oskar Schindler gradually becomes concerned for his Jewish workforce after witnessing their persecution by the Nazis. A devastating and essential portrait of humanity.
label: positive

title: Pulp Fiction
text: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster and his wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption. Tarantino's nonlinear storytelling redefined modern cinema.
label: positive

title: Inception
text: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a CEO. Nolan crafts a visually breathtaking puzzle about reality and consciousness.
label: positive

title: Interstellar
text: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival. Set against Earth's dying ecosystem, the film explores love, time dilation, and sacrifice across galaxies.
label: positive

title: The Matrix
text: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers. Revolutionary bullet-time effects and cyberpunk philosophy made this a cultural landmark.
label: positive

title: Parasite
text: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between the wealthy Park family and the destitute Kim clan. Bong Joon-ho's Oscar-winning masterpiece is a razor-sharp satire of capitalist society.
label: positive

title: Spirited Away
text: During her family's move to the suburbs, a sullen 10-year-old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods, witches, and spirits, and where humans are changed into beasts. Miyazaki's richest and most imaginative film.
label: positive

title: Forrest Gump
text: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the events of Vietnam, Watergate, and other historical events unfold from the perspective of an Alabama man with an extraordinary life. Tom Hanks delivers a career-defining performance.
label: positive

title: The Silence of the Lambs
text: A young FBI cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to help catch another serial killer. Anthony Hopkins' Hannibal Lecter is one of cinema's most terrifying and magnetic villains.
label: positive

title: Goodfellas
text: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife Karen Hill and his mob partners Jimmy Conway and Tommy DeVito in the Italian-American crime syndicate.
label: positive

title: Fight Club
text: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into something much, much more. Fincher's subversive thriller about masculinity and consumer culture.
label: positive

title: Whiplash
text: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cut-throat music conservatory where his dreams of greatness are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing to realize a student's potential. Relentlessly intense.
label: positive
